name: Sovereign System Upgrade
description: Checks for updates on GitHub and self-manages the upgrade mission through validation and merge.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). v1 used export_as without roles.

params.message: 🔍 Step 1: Checking for remote updates on GitHub...

params.cmd: git fetch origin main && git rev-parse HEAD

node dist/scripts/mission_controller.js create MSN-SYS-UPGRADE-{{remote_hash}} confidential default development knowledge/personal/my-vision.md 'Ecosystem Architect' '{"prerequisites":["MSN-SYS-SELF-UPDATE"]}'

params.message: ✅ Upgrade mission created. Execute with: node dist/scripts/mission_controller.js start MSN-SYS-UPGRADE-{{remote_hash}}
✅ System is already up to date. No action needed.
